eyebrow: C4 Dynamic · runtime flow — OAuth2 authorization-code + token
title: Execution order: OAuth2 / OIDC code flow with PKCE
subtitle: numbered steps = runtime order · each step = component → component + protocol · complements the api-oauth2 L3 (static)

steps.detail: redirected with client_id · scope · PKCE challenge — api-oauth2 is its own edge (NOT via api-gateway)
if no valid session → run the Login + MFA flow first
code bound to PKCE; browser redirected back to RP with the code
auth code + PKCE verifier — straight to api-oauth2, not api-gateway
verify code + PKCE; sign JWT — the private key never leaves backend-auth

refs: runs across: api-oauth2 (L3, §A3) · api-auth (L3, §A2) · backend-auth (L3, §A6) — via the nginx proxy edge (not api-gateway) — zoom out: Container view Auth & Tokens (L2)
